evals.prompt: Review the code changes on this branch compared to main using Codex. Check for logic errors and edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Uses /codex:review --base main or the companion script review command (node "$COMPANION" review --base main). Does NOT use raw 'codex exec' commands. May mention /codex:adversarial-review if custom focus is needed.

evals.prompt: Perform a thorough security audit of the src/auth/ directory using Codex, focusing on injection vulnerabilities and auth bypass.
evals.expected_output: Uses /codex:adversarial-review with security-focused positional text (e.g., 'security injection auth bypass') or the companion script adversarial-review command. Does NOT use raw 'codex exec'. May save artifacts to /tmp/xv/ for cross-verification.

evals.prompt: Verify the correctness of this algorithm using Codex. Also, handle the case where Codex might not be installed.
evals.expected_output: Checks Codex availability via /codex:setup or the companion script setup --json command (checking '.ready' field). If not available, directs the user to /codex:setup for installation and auth. Does NOT use raw 'command -v codex' or 'npm install -g @openai/codex' directly.
